items.title: Local SEO + language pages
items.note: Hyperlocal landing pages for Orland Park/Harlem/LaGrange geo targeting, plus Spanish and Arabic language pages. From the 7/16 Web Review call, genuine new workstream, no existing SEO item in the Maadi Law Web+SEO group (only Website + GBP).

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Build hyperlocal landing pages targeting Orland Park, Harlem, and LaGrange for local SEO, per Sharif's 7/16 direction on southwest suburb targeting.
  • Publish Spanish and Arabic language pages alongside the English site to support the multi-language ad and video push.
  • Genuinely new workstream, no existing SEO item in the Maadi Law group covers it (only Website and GBP).

@Muhammad Hashir Faiz @Zayan Faiz

items.note: Multi-language video shoot (English/Arabic/possibly Spanish) scheduled 7/27; AI-generated visuals to be removed from current Meta ad creatives per Sharif's 7/16 feedback; trending hooks/templates to be shared with him for new content ideas.

  • Multi-language video shoot (English, Arabic, possibly Spanish) scheduled for Monday, July 27, per Sharif's confirmed date.

@Ads Team @Khurram Jamil

items.title: Website Scope Expansion
items.note: Incremental scope on top of the already-sent PI Site Build subitem: wins page (45M+ recovered), homepage video background, press section, lighter maroon+blue color direction. Posts as an update on the existing Website item (12471110064), not a new item -- original PI-section ask already fired 7/15.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Expanded scope per Sharif's 7/16 Web Review call, in addition to the PI case-type section already queued:
  • Populate the Wins page with case results, total recovered now over $45 million.
  • Add a homepage video background once footage comes in from the 7/27 shoot.
  • Add a press section for media appearances.
  • Confirmed color direction: lighter maroon and blue scheme.

@Muhammad Hashir Faiz @Zayan Faiz

items.title: Creative Refresh
items.note: Update on existing 'New Subscription Box Creatives' subitem: July creative fatigue is dragging down a 4.56x ROAS Meta campaign. Haney sending fresh video/photo content; Sohib providing content/segmentation recommendations. Assigned to: Ads Team.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Update from the 7/17 90 day review call with Haney and Hoda: Meta ads have driven a 4.56x ROAS over the test period, but creative fatigue set in during July and is already dragging performance down.
  • Haney is sending fresh video and photo content for new creatives. Use it alongside Sohib's content and segmentation recommendations to refresh the subscription box creative set.
  • Keep messaging unified across Muslim and mainstream audiences, no explicit segmentation, per the brand direction confirmed on the call.
  • Waiting on client: Haney to send video/photo assets before new creatives can go live.

@Ads Team

items.title: Sales Dashboard
items.note: New subitem under 'Website' parent: reporting dashboard integrating Shopify sales data with Meta ad performance so ROAS/margin can be tracked in one place, supporting holiday campaign planning. Assigned to: Muhammad Hashir Faiz, Zayan Faiz.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • New deliverable from the 7/17 BillyDoe Meats review: build a reporting dashboard that integrates Shopify sales data with Meta ad performance so ROAS and profit margin (currently 18 to 30%) can be tracked in one place.
  • This supports the client's push toward holiday campaign planning and closer budget tracking as the account scales.
  • Done when the dashboard is live and pulling both Shopify and Meta data automatically.

@Muhammad Hashir Faiz @Zayan Faiz

items.title: Citrus Smiles pilot follow-up
items.note: Not a Monday task -- still a prospect, no board group. Follow-on 7/17 call to the pilot proposal Sohib already sent (Google+Meta ads, one office, GHL CRM). Mostly trust/positioning talk (patient walk-ins over lead volume); one open ask for patient walk-in data. Flagging for visibility only, distinct from the earlier 7/15 bundled prospects card.

items.title: Tagging + Note Scraper
items.note:
Assigned to: Ahmed Memon, Ali Shaheer

From the 7/19 review call: GHL contacts need to reliably distinguish patient vs. lead so list cleanup and reporting aren't muddied by closed patients still showing as active leads. Once that tagging is clean, build an AI note scraper that reads call/GHL notes and auto-applies the patient/lead tag going forward. Separate from the existing Duplicate Contacts cleanup (already Done), which was about removing duplicate records, not classifying patient vs. lead.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • From the 7/19 review call: GHL contacts need to reliably distinguish patient vs. lead so list cleanup and reporting aren't muddied by closed patients still showing as active leads.
  • Once that tagging is clean, build an AI note scraper that reads call/GHL notes and auto-applies the patient/lead tag going forward, so this doesn't need manual upkeep.
  • This is separate from the existing Duplicate Contacts cleanup (already Done) since that was about removing duplicate records, not classifying patient vs. lead.

@Ahmed Memon @Ali Shaheer

items.title: Call Routing Lag
items.note: From the 7/19 review call: calls transferring from the GHL number to the office phones are lagging or dropping. Find the root cause (call forwarding config, GHL phone system settings, etc.) and fix so transfers are near-instant. A dropped or slow transfer during a live call risks losing the patient before they reach the front desk. / Assigned to: Ahmed Memon, Ali Shaheer

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • From the 7/19 review call: calls transferring from the GHL number to the office phones are lagging or dropping.
  • Find the root cause (call forwarding config, GHL phone system settings, etc.) and fix so transfers are near-instant.
  • Why this matters: a dropped or slow transfer during a live call risks losing the patient before they reach the front desk.

@Ahmed Memon @Ali Shaheer

items.title: Marketing Dashboard
items.note:
Assigned to: Ahmed Memon, Ali Shaheer

Sohib wants a HIPAA-compliant dashboard that pulls GHL, Open Dental, and ad-platform data into one real-time view: spend by channel, leads by source, conversions, and patient value/booking outcomes. Came up twice across the 7/19 review call as the fix for reporting confusion that's been slowing down budget decisions (e.g. the Google vs. Meta reallocation call).

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Client wants a HIPAA-compliant dashboard that pulls GHL, Open Dental, and ad-platform data into one real-time view.
  • Needs to show: spend by channel, leads by source, conversions, and patient value/booking outcomes.
  • This came up twice across the 7/19 review call as the fix for reporting confusion that's been slowing down budget decisions (e.g. the Google vs. Meta reallocation call).

@Ahmed Memon @Ali Shaheer
